## Summary

<!-- What reusable engineering knowledge does this change add or fix? -->

## Classification

- [ ] This change is reusable by a stranger without my personal biography
- [ ] No personal notes, journals, highlights, or private vault paths are included
- [ ] `wiki/principles/` has no company/product/absolute-path leakage (if applicable)
- [ ] `wiki/case-studies/` has evidence paths and no secrets (if applicable)

## Sanitization (all must be **No**)

| Question | No |
|----------|----|
| Does this change depend on a private document? | [ ] |
| Was any passage copied/paraphrased from personal notes? | [ ] |
| Do examples contain personal context that is not an intentional public case study? | [ ] |
| Was a private path used as an authoritative reference without rewriting? | [ ] |
| Is there information only I possess that readers cannot generalize? | [ ] |

If any answer is **Yes**, do not open this PR until rewritten.

## Paths

- [ ] Diff only touches allowed public paths (`wiki/`, `docs/`, top-level project docs)
- [ ] No forbidden paths: `knowledge/`, `notes/`, `research/`, `journals/`, `experiments/`, `obsidian/`, `vault/`

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows `wiki/_meta/templates.md` when adding notes
- [ ] Public `wiki/` links do not point at private files
- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and [GOVERNANCE.md](../GOVERNANCE.md)
